name: Sacred Mending
acquisitionSource: Clear Operation: Astral Reign - Ch. 2 - Metamorphosis
descriptionTemplate: Recover [Heal:Arg1] HP and gain [Arg2] {STR}. If Clementine is in the team, add 1 additional instance of the following effects to her next Command Card: DMG, Shield, HP Recovery, Aliemus, and Keyflare.
lore:
She has healed countless patients, guiding them toward rebirth, and everything now is just a psychological therapy.
The only special thing is that the patient is herself.
